title: augustia dregei
intro: Augustia dregei, also known as the Cape August, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, possessing medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Augustia dregei include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Augustia dregei are often made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
